CONTENT.Honours: UEFA Youth League: 2019–20Real MadridCopa del Rey: 2022–23FIFA Club World Cup: 2022
CONTENT.Club career: Born in Madrid, Arribas joined Real Madrid's La Fábrica in 2012, after representing CD Leganés and CDE Benito Pérez Galdós. In September 2020, after helping the under-20s win the UEFA Youth League, he was promoted to the reserves in Segunda División B.Arribas made his first team – and La Liga – debut on 20 September 2020, coming on as a late substitute for Vinícius Júnior in a 0–0 away draw against Real Sociedad. His Champions League debut came on 9 December 2020 as a substitute, in a 2–0 victory over Borussia Mönchengladbach. He scored his first goal for the first team on 8 February 2023, in a 4–1 win against Al Ahly in the 2022 FIFA Club World Cup.On 9 August 2023, Arribas signed a six-year contract with Almería in the top tier. He scored his first goal in the top tier ten days later, netting the opener in a 3–1 home defeat to his former club, Real Madrid.

SUMMARY: Sergio Arribas Calvo (born 30 September 2001) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Segunda División club Almería.
